content.en:
Nine Desolation Sword Sect.

This is one of the triple sects, and it is also the top triple sect, with one quadruple ancestor, thousands of triple ancestors, and hundreds of thousands of twofold ancestors.

As for the first ancestor, its number has reached tens of millions.

For the Unbounded Primordial Ancestor, this was a behemoth, even if that Quadruple Primordial Ancestor didn't make a move, he could easily pinch him to death by sending a top-notch Quadruple Primordial Ancestor.

On the way here, the Unbounded Ancestor was very nervous.

Although he believed in Ye Tian's identity and strength, the nervousness in his heart still couldn't be concealed!

Soon, the Nine Desolation Sword Sect arrived!

Rumble!!!

A breath of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor emerged, locking the Boundless Origin Ancestor.

Under this breath, the Unbounded Ancestor seemed to be frozen, and even his thinking was difficult to operate, and the difference in strength between the two was too great!

But soon, the breath was gone.

It's just because Ye Tian made a move!

At this time, the Fourfold Origin Ancestor of the Nine Desolation Sword Sect, the White Bone Ancestor, looked at Ye Tian and was shocked, feeling a great danger.

"Who is Your Excellency?"

The White Bone Ancestor asked.

At this time, Ye Tian directly threw out his Holy Son token: "Void Tooth Holy Gate, Endless Ancestor!"

"Meet the Infinite Son!!

The White Bone Ancestor trembled and bent over.

The Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, this is a big man he can't touch!

Although the Nine Desolation Sword Sect is not a subsidiary force of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, nor is it qualified to be a subsidiary force, it is within the influence area of the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

He has now become a Quadruple Ancestor, so he also wants to develop the Nine Desolation Sword Sect into a Quadruple Heavenly Gate.

However, without the support of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, the Nine Desolation Sword Sect would never want to become a Quadruple Heavenly Gate.

Therefore, he naturally did not dare to offend the disciples of the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

Moreover, he had heard of the Endless Ancestor!

Although the Endless Origin Ancestor is a new Holy Son, in the circle of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, the fame is too great!

Now, the Endless Origin Ancestor is known as the First Holy Son of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, and he has killed many Holy Sons in seconds, and even the Nine Origin Ancestors who have been famous for countless years in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain have really died at the hands of the Endless Origin Ancestor.

This is a real killing, not a clone of the will.

Now, looking at the breath of the Endless Origin Ancestor, he had already advanced to the Fourfold Origin Ancestor realm.

It can be said that Ye Tian can kill him countless times in seconds now.

"The Ancestor of the Unbounded is my friend, I heard that there is a bit of a conflict between you?"

Ye Tian asked.

When the White Bone Ancestor heard this, he was immediately frightened and hurriedly explained: "Lord Endless Holy Son, it's just a misunderstanding, I am willing to compensate for the loss of the Boundless Ancestor." "

Immediately, the White Bone Ancestor compensated for some losses to the Unbounded Ancestor, for fear that the Unbounded Ancestor would not want to.

At this time, the Boundless Ancestor froze.

Is it so easy?

Moreover, Ye Tian is the Holy Son, the Holy Son of the Void Tooth Holy Gate????

, you're not an ordinary disciple!

Although he didn't know much, he also knew what the concept of the Holy Son of the Fivefold Holy Gate was, a disciple of the Fivefold Holy Gate was almost the same as the status of the Fourfold Heavenly Gate!

For him, this is definitely a big shot, and a big shot that he can't even match!

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian became such a big man in a short period of time.

Astound!

Unbelievable!

......

"Alright, let's end this matter!"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Lord Endless Son!"

The White Bone Ancestor said respectfully.

Immediately, Ye Tian left with the Unbounded Ancestor.

At this time.

A woman at the level of a Triple Origin Ancestor said with an unhappy face: "Grandpa, why did you imprison me and not let me speak, you are also a Fourfold Ancestor, why are you afraid of that Holy Son?"

"What do you know?" The White Bone Ancestor was furious: "That Holy Son can destroy our Nine Desolation Sword Sect with one finger, and if he destroys my Nine Desolation Sword Sect, he will not have the power to take care of it." Do you want our Nine Desolation Sword Sect to perish for this little thing for you? From today onwards, we will not be allowed to leave the Nine Desolation Sword Sect within the 100 million Origin Domain Era!"

"Grandpa......"

The woman was stunned and begged.

However, the ancestor of the white bones ignored his usual favorite granddaughter at all.

It's really that he was really frightened this time, he thought that the Boundless Ancestor who had no background actually moved out of the Endless Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate, this is the most terrifying character he provoked.

......

"Endless Ancestor, thank you this time!"

The Boundless Ancestor thanked.

"Okay, I'll only help you this time, solve it yourself next time, don't do things in my name. Ye Tian said.

"Endless Ancestor, I understand!"

The Unbounded Ancestor nodded.

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the Void Tooth Holy Gate.

For him, the matter of the Unbounded Ancestor was just a small episode.

Another long period of time passed, and with the assistance of a large number of resources, Ye Tian's cultivation had finally been promoted to the realm of the middle stage of the Quadruple Ancestor.

"Fortunately, I have obtained a huge amount of resources in the Supreme Treasure Land, otherwise my cultivation would not have been able to ascend to the middle stage of the Quadruple Origin Ancestor so quickly!" Ye Tian muttered.

Cultivating to break through to the middle stage of the Quadruple Ancestor, his strength has been greatly improved.

And during this period of time, he was also contemplating the ultimate path.

Although he can't comprehend the new Extreme Extreme Path, or it doesn't make sense to comprehend the new Extreme Extreme Path, he can continue to comprehend the original Extreme Extreme Path and raise it to the true limit.

Extreme Mountain.

Ye Tian's will clone has been cultivating and comprehending here, and one after another extreme extreme path has been raised to the extreme by him.

Although this kind of improvement is not too big an increase in strength, if all the extreme extremes are raised to the extreme, then his overall strength will still be improved.

this day.

When Ye Tian was cultivating, Feng Ming's original ancestor sent him a message and asked him to attend a meeting.

This time, all the Four Primordial Sons will participate.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Void Tooth Palace, and the Fourfold Ancestor Holy Son also came here.

This time, it was not Feng Ming's ancestor who presided over this meeting.

Feng Ming's original ancestor was only an elder in the late stage of the fivefold original ancestor in the main lineage, and this time it was the elder of the peak of the fivefold original ancestor, the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor, who presided over the meeting.

This Heavenly Tooth Elder is the younger brother of the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor.

Strictly speaking, the original founders of the Void Fang Holy Gate were the Void Fang Holy Ancestor, the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor and the Dragon Tooth Holy Ancestor, and the most powerful was the Void Fang Holy Ancestor, and the Heavenly Fang Holy Ancestor and the Dragon Tooth Holy Ancestor both possessed the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, and their status in the Void Fang Holy Gate was very high, not comparable to the Fengming Origin Ancestor.

"This time, it turned out to be the Heavenly Crescent Holy Ancestor to support the meeting, it should be a big deal!"

Not only Ye Tian thought so, but other holy sons also thought so.
